mappings.reason: Addressing unauthorized assets includes the mechanism to deny remote connections, providing a subset coverage of the ability to disconnect remote access for unauthorized asset scenarios.

Establishing an access revoking process with immediate account disabling provides the defined process and mechanism to expeditiously disable remote access for termination and role change business needs.
Managing access control for remotely connecting assets determines access levels based on security posture, providing a mechanism to disable remote access based on compliance business needs.
